description: RED-phase test artifacts persist in DOM test file. feedRowEditMode.vitest.ts still carries RED PHASE headers (lines 4, 9, 20, 57, 70, 107, 192) stating 'Expected outcome: ALL tests FAIL' and 'These imports will FAIL because the modules/functions do not exist yet.' Every test wraps function calls in try/catch blocks that swallow exceptions. Now that the implementation exists (GREEN phase), these try/catch wrappers mask real runtime exceptions — a genuine bug in mountCodeMirrorForNote or unmountCodeMirrorForNote would be silently swallowed, and tests would fail with misleading 'expected null not to be null' errors instead of surfacing the actual exception.

secondaryEvidence.description: Additional try/catch wrappers in double-mount, enterEditMode, exitEditMode tests
